name: Cards
description: The FlowX card model: Primary cards structure a page, Secondary cards group content inside them. Every card shares a 16px radius; the difference is shadow versus border and the padding and gap step.

shared.layout: column flex; padding applies equally to both axes; gap is the spacing between the card's stacked children

pageBackground.note: grey app background Primary cards sit on

primary.role: Structures a page. Sits directly on the grey page background and holds everything else.
notes: Titles and icons are optional: can lead with an icon tile and title, carry a title alone, or have neither
Full-bleed content like a table can drop the padding and run edge to edge, still clipped to the card's 16px corner radius (white surface + shadow + overflow hidden, no card padding)

secondary.role: Groups content inside a Primary card.

whenToUse: Confusion matrix and training distribution subsections
Protocol, authorization and general settings subsections in an external file-storage data source
Evaluators and scorers in the Eval Definitions tab
Score cards (label, percentage and progress bar) inside the experiment report when comparing two experiments in Evals
Improvement Suggestions rows on the experiment page

notes: The three sizes differ only by padding and gap
Titles and icons are optional: can pair an icon with a title, carry only a label, or have neither

dsButton.note: White secondary button used inside cards

iconTile.note: Square icon container leading a card header

guidelines: Pick the family by where the card sits: Primary on the grey page background, Secondary inside a Primary
Every card uses a 16px corner radius, no exceptions
Primary is white with a shadow and no border; Secondary has a 1px neutral-100 border and no shadow or elevation
Padding applies to both axes equally; gap spaces the card's stacked children
Secondary comes in three sizes that differ only by padding and gap: L 24/16, M 16/8, S 8/4
Titles and icons are optional in both families
Full-bleed content like a table may drop the Primary padding and run edge to edge, clipped to the 16px radius

themes.dark: not documented; the pattern page keeps example mockups light
